---

## Authorized Scope

Link the repository, issue, or security program rule that authorizes this audit.

## Target

List the files, module, feature, or dependency area to review.

## Review Goals

- Identify defensive hardening opportunities.
- Prefer fixes and tests over public exploit details.
- Avoid intrusive testing or third-party traffic.

## Findings

Record only safe summaries here. Keep sensitive details private until disclosure rules are clear.

## Validation Plan

Describe how proposed fixes will be tested.
